vendor.supportNote: Public security page, a public 'Download SSD Documents' library, and per-cert CMVP links; drive-level SED/FIPS integration detail ships with the product or under NDA. No standalone crypto-module support portal.
vendor.verifiedNote: Fetched: security page is fully public with SIE/SED/FIPS explainer, a public document-download page, and direct CMVP certificate links (CM7/PM7 140-3).
